segments.speaker: 题目19/20
segments.text: Listen to an announcement at a university gym. Attention, the fitness center will be closing in two minutes. Please wrap up your workouts. Remember to return all dumbbells, bars, and other items to their proper places. As a reminder, we will be closed for our cleanup day tomorrow, but we hope to see you again when we reopen on Saturday morning, the day after tomorrow. Have a good night and a safe trip home.
